transcript:
CALLER: Hello. Mujhe parking ke baare mein puchna tha. Agar main car lekar aauon toh parking milegi?
AGENT: Haan ji, humare paas basement parking available hai. Kaafi spacious hai, aur pehle 2 ghante ke liye free hai. Uske baad 20 rupaye per hour charge hoga.
CALLER: Aur two-wheelers ke liye?
AGENT: Two-wheeler parking bilkul free hai humari clinic ke side mein dedicated area mein.
CALLER: Accha, aur clinic mein cafeteria ya canteen hai?
AGENT: Haan, ground floor pe ek small cafeteria hai jo subah 8 baje se raat 9 baje tak open rehti hai. Light snacks, coffee, aur meals milti hain.
CALLER: Bahut acha, shukriya!
